valuation.label: Valuation Sensitivity
valuation.description: Enterprise value, equity value, value per share, offer price, and selected range sensitivity.

sensitivity_rows.threshold_or_breakpoint: valuation floor or ceiling where recommendation changes

valuation.trigger: minimum valuation support for client recommendation
valuation.deal_action: revisit selected range, buyer universe, timing, or process recommendation

debt_capacity.label: Debt Capacity Sensitivity
debt_capacity.description: Debt quantum, leverage, coverage, liquidity, and financing capacity sensitivity.

sensitivity_rows.sensitivity_name: Debt capacity by EBITDA and leverage
Interest burden by rates and spreads

debt_capacity.deal_action: reduce leverage, change tranche mix, increase equity, or adjust bid

covenant_headroom.label: Covenant Headroom Sensitivity
covenant_headroom.description: Covenant cushion, first breach, liquidity, and cure/amendment trigger sensitivity.

sensitivity_rows.sensitivity_name: Covenant cushion by EBITDA and debt
Coverage by rate move and EBITDA miss

covenant_headroom.trigger: covenant cushion falls below acceptable threshold
covenant_headroom.deal_action: seek covenant relief, equity cure, pricing change, debt reduction, or amendment strategy

financing_terms.label: Financing Terms Sensitivity
financing_terms.description: Rate, spread, OID, fee, tenor, proceeds, dilution, and market-window sensitivity.

sensitivity_rows.sensitivity_name: Net proceeds by OID and fees
Equity dilution by proceeds and share price

financing_terms.trigger: market terms make financing uneconomic or proceeds insufficient
financing_terms.deal_action: resize issuance, change structure, delay launch, or alter use of proceeds

merger_model.label: Merger Model Sensitivity
merger_model.description: Premium, cash/stock mix, synergies, ownership, accretion/dilution, and pro forma leverage sensitivity.

sensitivity_rows.sensitivity_name: Ownership and leverage by financing mix

merger_model.trigger: premium, synergies, or financing mix breaches accretion/leverage tolerance
merger_model.deal_action: revise offer price, financing mix, synergy case, or exchange ratio

downside.label: Downside and Breakage Sensitivity
downside.description: Combined downside case and first-break analysis across valuation, liquidity, covenant, financing, and returns.

sensitivity_rows.sensitivity_name: Liquidity by revenue decline and margin compression
Downside return by EBITDA and exit multiple

downside.trigger: first breakage point appears in liquidity, covenant, financing, valuation, or returns
downside.deal_action: reset price, change financing, add protection, defer process, or increase diligence

returns.label: Sponsor Returns Sensitivity
returns.description: IRR, MOIC, entry/exit multiple, leverage, deleveraging, cash sweep, and maximum purchase price sensitivity.

sensitivity_rows.sensitivity_name: IRR/MOIC by entry and exit multiple
Maximum purchase price at target return

returns.trigger: sponsor return falls below target or maximum purchase price is exceeded
returns.deal_action: reset bid, reduce leverage risk, revise value-creation plan, or change exit assumptions
